title: R4 plan amendment enqueued: cycles 12+13 dead-scope marked completed-redundant (intent 5694b418)
body: Plan amendment authored: YAML status flips pending → completed on cycles 12+13 + §R4 absorption entry above §R3 with verification commands captured.
